name: Orange Roughy with Lemon Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Orange roughy fillets (4 oz each or use any white fish of your choice)
2 Tablespoons Olive oil or vegetable oil
1 Tablespoon Each chopped parsley and fresh lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip 1 fish fillet in the egg white, then into bread crumbs, coating both sides evenly. Repeat for the remaining fillet. Ensure all sides are covered.
2. Heat oil in a 9-inch non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add fillets and cook until thoroughly cooked and flake easily when tested with a fork (3-5 minutes per side). Transfer fish to a platter and keep warm.
3. In the same skillet, add garlic and cook over medium heat for about 30 seconds. Stir in water, wine, parsley, lemon juice, and broth mix. Cook until mixture boils, then reduce to about 1/4 cup (4-5 minutes). Pour sauce over fish and serve. This recipe pairs well with wild rice and steamed carrots in honey and brown sugar.
